partial_progress.details: Iteration 4: Added 7 new theorems/definitions for Pattern C infrastructure. Key additions: mutual_canonicalR_implies_reflexive, equiv_GContent_subset, reflexive_equiv_witness_sees_target, equiv_witness_preserves_intermediate, StrictDensityWitness, checkStrictness, strictDensityAttempt. All 6 sorries confirmed to require proof restructuring - current proof uses exfalso in branches where configuration is mathematically consistent but doesn't provide strict witness.

next_steps: The remaining sorries require restructuring density_frame_condition_strict to use iteration: (1) Replace nested by_cases + exfalso structure with pattern matching on strictDensityAttempt result, (2) Prove fuel_suffices theorem showing bounded iteration terminates, (3) Use strict_intermediate_exists_aux to complete the proof. Estimated 3-4 hours.

completion_data.completion_summary: Iteration 4 added 7 Pattern C infrastructure components (helper theorems, structures, noncomputable definitions). Build passes. No sorries eliminated this iteration - sorries require deeper restructuring of the proof approach from exfalso-based contradiction to iteration-based witness search.
